extraction.one_line_summary: CRONE Andres won from a 4-rider breakaway on the final climb after Movistar isolated their own leaders by decimating the field but failing to bridge.
tactical_patterns: Movistar used Shelling/Verona/Pedrero to drop Sagan 5km from climb summit, but abandoned pacing with Verona remaining for valley.
BikeExchange failed to pace when Crone group escaped, waiting for Chaves on final climb when gap reached 35 seconds.
Lotto-Soudal committed zero resources to chase despite having Smith in peloton, prioritizing Crone's breakaway chance over controlled sprint.
Jumbo controlled Camna's gap solely to protect GC positions, not attempting to bring back for Roglic sprint opportunity.

rider_signals.CRONE Andres: positive: Won first World Tour race with superior positioning, using Rochas draft to beat Leon Sanchez from 250m
rider_signals.SHELLING Ide: positive: Paced climbs hard enough to drop Sagan while still finishing 7th in reduced sprint
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: Dropped 5km from climb summit on 6% gradient when Movistar accelerated, confirming poor climbing form
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: neutral: Movistar isolated him in front group but positioned second wheel blocking chase instead of contesting sprint
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: negative: Lost wheels on technical descent despite being marked GC option, caught back but showed handling vulnerability
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: Yo-yoed on main climb and popped on false flat after descent started, not surviving sustained pace
